name: Texas Tech University Health Sciences Center
message: Beginning in 1969 as the Texas Tech University School of Medicine, Texas Tech University Health Sciences Center (TTUHSC) is now a five-school, comprehensive health-related university with campuses in Abilene, Amarillo, Dallas/Fort Worth, Lubbock and Midland/Odessa.We present to you a large collection of confidential documents, including - patient data, medical research, a large set of SQL databases.
